scenarios.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Export Collapse
scenarios.description: A 30% drop in Taiwan semiconductor exports and cascade through compute-dependent economies.

scenarios.name: China Rare Earth Export Control
scenarios.description: A 35% contraction in Chinese rare-earth exports hitting defense and renewable supply chains.

scenarios.name: Saudi Crude Oil Supply Cut
scenarios.description: A 25% Saudi crude production cut pressuring importers and energy-intensive sectors.

scenarios.name: Russia Natural Gas Disruption
scenarios.description: A 40% Russian natural gas supply disruption affecting European power and industry.

scenarios.name: Ukraine Wheat Export Disruption
scenarios.description: A 45% drop in Ukrainian wheat exports stressing food-security systems.

scenarios.name: DRC Cobalt Supply Disruption
scenarios.description: A 30% DRC cobalt supply disruption propagating into EV battery manufacturing.

scenarios.name: Chile Lithium Export Disruption
scenarios.description: A 35% Chilean lithium export shock hitting battery and automotive chains.

scenarios.name: Strait of Hormuz Crude Route Disruption
scenarios.description: A 40% reduction in crude oil transiting Hormuz and downstream import pressure.

scenarios.name: Panama Canal Shipping Disruption
scenarios.description: A 35% Panama Canal container capacity shock disrupting global logistics.

scenarios.name: South China Sea Electronics Disruption
scenarios.description: A 30% South China Sea semiconductor shipping disruption hitting electronics trade.
